'''dawaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thalamegos|thalamegos]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-w-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thalamegos|thalamegos]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dawaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæwæzæth|dæwæzæth]] || [[word:dæwæzæj|dæwæzæj]] || [[word:dæwæzæsh|dæwæzæsh]] || [[word:dæwæzæ|dæwæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dawawazath|dawawazath]] || [[word:dawawazaj|dawawazaj]] || [[word:dawawazash|dawawazash]] || [[word:dawawaza|dawawaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dawazath|dawazath]] || [[word:dawazaj|dawazaj]] || [[word:dawazash|dawazash]] || [[word:dawaza|dawaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dawafzath|dawafzath]] || [[word:dawafzaj|dawafzaj]] || [[word:dawafzash|dawafzash]] || [[word:dawafzaf|dawafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dawazatha|dawazatha]] || [[word:dawazaja|dawazaja]] || [[word:dawazasha|dawazasha]] || [[word:dawazaka|dawazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dawazath|dawazath]] || [[word:dawazaj|dawazaj]] || [[word:dawazash|dawazash]] || [[word:dawaza|dawaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dawazathal|dawazathal]] || [[word:dawazajal|dawazajal]] || [[word:dawazashal|dawazashal]] || [[word:dawazakal|dawazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dawazathatha|dawazathatha]] || [[word:dawazajaja|dawazajaja]] || [[word:dawazashasha|dawazashasha]] || [[word:dawazaka|dawazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dawazathan|dawazathan]] || [[word:dawazajan|dawazajan]] || [[word:dawazashan|dawazashan]] || [[word:dawazakan|dawazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dawazathaoro|dawazathaoro]] || [[word:dawazajaoro|dawazajaoro]] || [[word:dawazashaoro|dawazashaoro]] || [[word:dawazakaoro|dawazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
